sentences.translationEn: Children learn a lot by imitating adults.

sentences.arabic: لَاحَظَتْ سَنَاءُ أَنَّ ابْنَهَا يَقُولُ «مِنْ فَضْلِكَ» دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Sanaa je primijetila da joj sin uvijek govori "molim".
sentences.translationEn: Sanaa noticed that her son always said "please".

sentences.translation: Znala je da je to naučio od nje.
sentences.translationEn: She knew that he had learned it from her.

sentences.arabic: الطِّفْلُ يَنْظُرُ إِلَيْنَا وَيَتَعَلَّمُ مِنَّا كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Dijete nas gleda i uči od nas svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: The child watches us and learns from us every day.
